allow: Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv/config'\).then\(async\(\)=>{const u=process.env.DATABASE_URL;if\(!u\){console.log\('NO_DATABASE_URL'\);return}const pg=await import\('pg'\);const c=new pg.default.Client\({connectionString:u}\);try{await c.connect\(\);const r=await c.query\(\\"select to_regclass\('public.task_completions'\) as tc, to_regclass\('public.officers'\) as o, to_regclass\('public.ward_published_reports'\) as wpr\\"\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows[0]\)\);await c.end\(\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('DB_ERR:'+e.message\)}}\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv/config'\).then\(async\(\)=>{const pg=await import\('pg'\);const c=new pg.default.Client\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\);await c.connect\(\);const t=await c.query\(\\"select to_regclass\('public.ward_published_reports'\) wpr, to_regclass\('public.ward_publish_schedule'\) wps, to_regclass\('public._prisma_sql_patches'\) tracker\\"\);console.log\('tables:',JSON.stringify\(t.rows[0]\)\);const p=await c.query\('select filename from _prisma_sql_patches order by filename'\);console.log\('tracked:',p.rows.map\(r=>r.filename\).join\(', '\)\);const col=await c.query\(\\"select column_name from information_schema.columns where table_name='task_completions' and column_name='proof_type'\\"\);console.log\('task_completions.proof_type exists:',col.rows.length>0\);await c.end\(\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv/config'\).then\(async\(\)=>{const pg=await import\('pg'\);const c=new pg.default.Client\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\);await c.connect\(\);const q=\\`SELECT label, CASE WHEN before_image_url IS NOT NULL AND before_image_url = after_image_url THEN 'invalidation' ELSE 'completion' END AS resolved_type FROM \(VALUES \('completion-upload \(before=NULL, after=img\)', NULL::text, 'imgA'\), \('invalidation-upload \(before=after=img\)', 'imgB', 'imgB'\), \('completion-then-different', 'imgOld', 'imgNew'\)\) AS t\(label, before_image_url, after_image_url\)\\`;const r=await c.query\(q\);console.table\(r.rows\);await c.end\(\)}\)")

Bash(git commit --amend -m 'Sprint 1: stabilize backend foundation' -m 'B1: replace missing task_completions.proof_type column with a before/after image heuristic \(before=after => invalidation, else completion\) in officer.service.ts; fixes complete/invalidate flows that errored on the nonexistent column. *)

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const p=require\('path'\);function w\(d\){for\(const f of fs.readdirSync\(d\)\){const fp=p.join\(d,f\);const s=fs.statSync\(fp\);if\(s.isDirectory\(\)&&!fp.includes\('node_modules'\)&&!f.startsWith\('.'\)\)w\(fp\);else if\(/reportDraft/.test\(f\)\)console.log\(fp\)}}w\('.'\)")

Bash(curl.exe -s -m 45 -X POST "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.5-flash:generateContent" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-goog-api-key: AIzaSyCE4lOYBjAJhvBQByiBZSyCOjfxly9waCc" -d "{\\"contents\\":[{\\"parts\\":[{\\"text\\":\\"Reply with the single word OK\\"}]}]}")

Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv/config'\).then\(async\(\)=>{const pg=\(await import\('pg'\)\).default;const c=new pg.Client\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\);await c.connect\(\);const q=await c.query\(\\"select table_name,column_name,data_type from information_schema.columns where table_name in \('reports','users','officers','wards','municipalities','notifications','officer_departments','departments'\) and column_name in \('id','report_id','user_id','officer_id','ward_id','municipality_id','department_id'\) order by table_name,column_name\\"\);console.table\(q.rows\);await c.end\(\);}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('ERR',e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv/config'\).then\(async\(\)=>{const fs=await import\('node:fs/promises'\);const pg=\(await import\('pg'\)\).default;const c=new pg.Client\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\);await c.connect\(\);const before=await c.query\(\\"select count\(*\)::int n from information_schema.tables where table_name in \('chats','chat_participants','messages','message_receipts'\)\\"\);console.log\('tables before rollback:',before.rows[0].n\);const sql=await fs.readFile\('prisma/rollback/20260519_chat_core_rollback.sql','utf8'\);await c.query\(sql\);const after=await c.query\(\\"select count\(*\)::int n from information_schema.tables where table_name in \('chats','chat_participants','messages','message_receipts'\)\\"\);const enums=await c.query\(\\"select count\(*\)::int n from pg_type where typname like 'chat\\\\\\\\_%'\\"\);const track=await c.query\(\\"select count\(*\)::int n from _prisma_sql_patches where filename='20260519_chat_core.sql'\\"\);console.log\('tables after rollback:',after.rows[0].n,'| chat enums left:',enums.rows[0].n,'| tracking row:',track.rows[0].n\);await c.end\(\);}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('ERR',e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv/config'\).then\(async\(\)=>{const pg=\(await import\('pg'\)\).default;const c=new pg.Client\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\);await c.connect\(\);const r=await c.query\('select pg_terminate_backend\(27816\) AS killed, pg_terminate_backend\(8944\) AS killed2'\);console.log\('terminated stale bridge sessions:',r.rows[0]\);await c.end\(\);}\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5055 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "port 5055 cleared")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5055 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "test server stopped, advisory lock released")

Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv/config'\).then\(async\(\)=>{const pg=\(await import\('pg'\)\).default;const c=new pg.Client\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\);await c.connect\(\);const r=await c.query\(\\"select l.pid,l.objid,a.state,a.client_addr,backend_start, left\(a.query,30\) q from pg_locks l join pg_stat_activity a on a.pid=l.pid where l.locktype='advisory' and l.objid in \(24040101,24050191\)\\"\);console.table\(r.rows\);await c.end\(\);}\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5055 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; "5055 cleared")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5055 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; "restarting")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5055 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; "stopped")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5055 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "test server stopped, advisory locks released")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5055 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; "stopped")
